title: SAVING GRACE HUMANE SOCIETY - 211info
text: SAVING GRACE HUMANE SOCIETY SAVING GRACE HUMANE SOCIETY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an animal shelter that cares for homeless, abandoned, or neglected animals. Offers a pet food pantry when supplies are available and accepts pet food donations. The shelter maintains lost-and-found pet reports for Douglas County and ensures that all adoptable cats and dogs are spayed or neutered and microchipped before adoption. Pets are accepted for surrender only in emergencies and as space allows, and low-cost spay and neuter surgeries are offered on a limited basis. 450 Old Del Rio Road Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Tuesday-Saturday noon-7pm Email (541) 672-3907 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-3907 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, walk in, or visit website for more information FEES: Fees for adoption, stray animals returned to owners, and spay/neuter. Fees are negotiable and may be waived if owners cannot afford them. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: North of Roseburg off of Interstate 5 on Old Del Rio Road Services: Animal Adoption Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Animal Shelters Neuter/Spay Services Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
